profile.name: Pham Thi Van Anh
profile.headline: Digital Marketing Leader & Campaign Strategist
profile.availability: Available April – December 2026 (Singapore Student Pass valid until Jan 2027)
profile.cv_source: CV.docx (source of truth for experience, education, skills)
profile.summary: A digital marketing leader with a passion for building brand narratives that connect and convert. With hands-on experience leading campaigns for global brands and high-growth startups, I bridge the gap between creative vision and measurable results. Trained in international communications and marketing strategy, I thrive in environments that demand both analytical rigour and bold storytelling.

education.note: Admitted with scholarship; QS Business Master's Ranking #2 (2023–2025); GPA: 17.22/20

education.degree: Master of Arts in International Communications
Viral Marketing & How to Craft Contagious Content

experience.description: Consumer and sales data analysis for Singapore FMCG confectionery market.
highlights: Conducted consumer and sales data analysis to identify purchase drivers in Singapore markets
Conducted competitor benchmarking across 6 FMCG confectionery brands with SWOT analysis
Identified key functional and emotional brand insights
Developed marketing activation strategy integrating digital engagement and experiential campaigns

experience.description: Led digital marketing strategy for an international fintech/startup focused on data-driven small and micro-cap investment analytics. Managed multi-channel campaigns across social, email, LinkedIn, and WhatsApp.
highlights: Managed digital campaigns across multiple platforms to 15k+ Telegram, 7.6k Instagram, 5.2k Twitter
Analysed marketing performance generating consumer trend insights and sales optimization recommendations
Built email marketing automation system using AWS SES and CI/CD infrastructure
Scaled LinkedIn subscriber base to 46k+ and leveraged 35k+ WhatsApp API network for marketing distribution
Built automated reporting dashboards using Excel and analytics tools

experience.role: UNIQLO Manager Candidate – Assistant Store Manager
experience.description: Participated in UNIQLO's Management Candidate program, developing retail operations, team leadership, and customer experience expertise across Japan and Vietnam markets.
highlights: Managed daily store operations generating 75,000+ items with high inventory accuracy
Monitored sales performance and prepared weekly reports
Led and trained a team of 54 staff, improving customer service efficiency and store workflow
Implemented weekly sales and merchandising strategies
Contributed to 112% sales growth in peak months
Maintained 92–98% monthly target achievement through operational improvements

experience.role: Digital Marketing Assistant – Global OEM Solutions
experience.description: Supported global OEM solutions marketing for the Vietnam market, working within Dell's Asia-Pacific marketing division.
highlights: Produced website content, email marketing campaigns, PR content and social media assets
Organised monthly webinars increasing engagement by 40% and conversion by 25%
Tracked campaign performance processing data from 1,000+ calls per week
Analysed approximately 100 VIP customer records for weekly reporting
Supported international Dell events in Vietnam and Singapore with 450+ global participants

campaigns.name: Soirée by Sephora
campaigns.description: Campaign concept for Sephora's nightwear collection launch. Developed moodboard, brand narrative, and event concept for a premium evening experience targeting beauty enthusiasts and fashion-conscious consumers in Vietnam.
campaigns.challenge: Create an elevated brand experience that differentiates Sephora's nightwear line in a competitive beauty retail market.
campaigns.strategy: Positioned the collection around luxury self-care rituals, creating a "Soirée" (evening party) concept that transforms a product launch into an aspirational lifestyle moment.

campaigns.name: Market Share Expansion
campaigns.description: Strategic market penetration campaign for AB InBev's beer portfolio targeting the Vietnamese market. Developed insights-driven campaign to increase brand presence and market share through targeted activations and retail partnerships.
campaigns.challenge: Increase market share in a saturated beer market with strong local competitors and changing consumer preferences.
campaigns.strategy: Data-driven consumer segmentation, targeted on-trade activations, and localised brand messaging to drive trial and loyalty.
deliverables: Market research and consumer insights report

campaigns.name: MoMo Super App Growth
campaigns.description: Growth marketing campaign for MoMo's new feature set — gifting, digital card creation, and everyday payment services. Worked on product development collaboration and activation campaigns to drive feature adoption across Vietnam's largest e-wallet user base.
campaigns.challenge: Drive adoption of new product features in a competitive fintech landscape where users already have entrenched habits.
campaigns.strategy: Gamified onboarding journeys, referral programs, and micro-incentives to make feature discovery feel rewarding rather than transactional.
deliverables: Feature launch strategy and rollout plan

campaigns.name: Violent Communication Framework
campaigns.description: Developed a comprehensive communication strategy framework based on the 'violent vs. compassionate communication' model. Designed for personal brand positioning and CSR initiatives, demonstrating strategic thinking around communication psychology and its practical application in business and social contexts.
campaigns.challenge: Translate communication psychology concepts into actionable framework for professional and social application.
campaigns.strategy: Segmented communication styles, identified trigger points, and designed response frameworks that build empathy and avoid escalation — applicable to customer service, team management, and public relations.
deliverables: Visual breakdown of violent vs. compassionate styles

campaigns.name: Dyson Love Edition 2026
campaigns.description: Campaign concept for Dyson's 'Love Edition' 2026 product launch. Developed vanity hub strategy, ritual design language, and premium brand positioning targeting affluent Vietnamese consumers seeking elevated home appliance experiences.
campaigns.challenge: Position Dyson's premium appliance range as a gift-worthy, emotionally resonant product category ahead of gifting season.
campaigns.strategy: Created a "Love Edition" narrative that positions Dyson products as expressions of care and self-investment — merging product function with emotional gifting motivation.
deliverables: Ritual design language for product use

campaigns.name: Discover My Character
campaigns.description: Multi-channel brand campaign for PNJ jewellery in partnership with TikTok, centered around the 'Discover My Character' competition. Leveraged KOL (Key Opinion Leader) content, offline event activation, and TikTok challenge format to drive jewellery brand engagement among Gen Z consumers.
campaigns.challenge: Modernise PNJ's brand image to appeal to Gen Z while maintaining premium jewellery positioning.
campaigns.strategy: Created a TikTok challenge around self-expression and jewellery styling, pairing with KOL posts and an offline activation event to drive both online buzz and in-store footfall.

campaigns.name: New Product Launch — Social Growth
campaigns.description: Multi-product launch framework combining Instagram and TikTok growth strategy, B2B partnership development, and event amplification. A scalable campaign structure designed for consumer product launches across categories.
campaigns.challenge: Build rapid brand awareness and early adopter community for a new consumer product with limited marketing budget.
campaigns.strategy: Phased launch strategy: pre-launch teaser content on TikTok → launch week Instagram takeover → B2B partnership seeding → event amplification to convert early adopters into brand ambassadors.

campaigns.name: Last Bite Best Bite
campaigns.description: MVP concept and launch campaign for an airport food brand focused on authentic local cuisine positioned for transit travellers. Developed brand identity, product positioning around 'authentic value,' and local food pop-up activation strategy.
campaigns.challenge: Create a memorable food brand experience in a high-speed, low-engagement transit environment where travellers prioritse convenience over discovery.
campaigns.strategy: Positioned the brand around the concept that the last food experience before a journey is often the most memorable. Built a pop-up activation and brand story that transforms routine transit eating into a mini-culinary adventure.

campaigns.name: Antique Authenticity
campaigns.description: Brand positioning campaign framework built around uniqueness, novelty, personalisation, and cultural/historical value. Applicable to heritage brands, luxury goods, and artisanal products seeking to communicate irreplaceable worth.
campaigns.challenge: Develop a brand positioning framework for products where authenticity and uniqueness are the primary value drivers, but may be difficult to communicate through conventional marketing.
campaigns.strategy: Built a layered brand story architecture: Cultural value → Historical authenticity → Novelty → Personalisation — creating a narrative ladder that elevates product perception beyond utility.
